description: Explore the equity implications of recent housing development in San Francisco by creating and executing a Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/development_equity.ipynb using the UrbanSim dataset at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The analysis must calculate total residential units (treating NaNs as 0), recent units (built since 2000), and median household income for each zone by mapping buildings and households through the parcels table. Filter the results to zones with at least 50 total units and 20 households, then classify these zones into four income quartiles (labeled 1-4). Export the zone-level metrics (zone_id, total_units, recent_units, median_income, household_count, income_quartile) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_development_equity.csv and a quartile summary (income_quartile, total_units, recent_units, pct_of_citywide_recent_units) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/quartile_absorption.csv. Additionally, generate a bar chart showing recent units by income quartile at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/recent_units_by_income.png. The notebook must be fully executed.
